title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source solution for processing large codebases by creating knowledge graphs without requiring RAG. It enables more accurate, token-efficient responses by storing and retrieving structured code information. The tool addresses memory and context limitations when working with large code projects using Claude Code.
